name: Frangos
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips using a double boiler.
2. Beat together the powdered sugar, butter, and eggs until fluffy.
3. Add vanilla extract and peppermint extract to the mixture.
4. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Pour the mixture into small fluted candy papers.
6. Allow the treats to cool completely.
7. These will freeze well. Alternatively, you can pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch x 8-inch cake pan and cut into squares.
